name: Semantic Bookmark Search
description: Search your bookmarks by meaning, not exact text — fully on-device, no account.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://huggingface.co https://*.huggingface.co https://*.hf.co data: blob:;
